completions.label: page-app-router

documentation.value: Creates a new App Router page component with typed props including params and searchParams.

completions.label: layout-component

documentation.value: Creates a root or nested layout component for the App Router with children prop.

completions.label: loading-component

documentation.value: Creates a loading.tsx component that shows a loading UI while a route segment loads using React Suspense.

completions.label: error-component

documentation.value: Creates an error.tsx component with error boundary handling and reset functionality. Must be a Client Component.

completions.label: not-found-component

documentation.value: Creates a not-found.tsx component displayed when notFound() is called within a route segment.

completions.label: route-handler-get

documentation.value: Creates a GET route handler for the App Router using the Web Request/Response API.

completions.label: route-handler-post

documentation.value: Creates a POST route handler for the App Router with request body parsing.

completions.label: route-handler-put

documentation.value: Creates a PUT route handler for updating resources.

completions.label: route-handler-delete

documentation.value: Creates a DELETE route handler for removing resources.

completions.label: route-handler-patch

documentation.value: Creates a PATCH route handler for partial updates.

completions.label: middleware

documentation.value: Creates a middleware.ts file for request interception with matcher configuration.

completions.label: generateMetadata

documentation.value: Creates an async generateMetadata function for dynamic metadata generation in App Router pages.

completions.label: generateStaticParams

documentation.value: Creates a generateStaticParams function for static generation of dynamic route segments at build time.

completions.label: server-action

documentation.value: Creates a server action function with 'use server' directive for form handling and data mutations.

completions.label: server-action-inline

documentation.value: Creates an inline server action inside a Server Component.

completions.label: use-client

documentation.value: Creates a Client Component with 'use client' directive for interactive UI with hooks and event handlers.

completions.label: server-component

documentation.value: Creates an async Server Component with data fetching capabilities.

completions.label: api-route-pages

documentation.value: Creates a Pages Router API route handler with typed request and response.

completions.label: getServerSideProps-snippet

documentation.value: Creates a getServerSideProps function for server-side rendering on each request in Pages Router.

completions.label: getStaticProps-snippet

documentation.value: Creates a getStaticProps function for static generation with optional ISR revalidation in Pages Router.

completions.label: getStaticPaths-snippet

documentation.value: Creates a getStaticPaths function for defining dynamic paths at build time in Pages Router.

completions.label: app-component

documentation.value: Creates a custom _app.tsx component for Pages Router to initialize pages.

completions.label: document-component

documentation.value: Creates a custom _document.tsx component for Pages Router to augment the HTML document structure.

completions.label: dynamic-route-page

documentation.value: Creates a page component for a dynamic route segment [param].

completions.label: parallel-route

documentation.value: Creates a layout for parallel routes with named slots using @folder convention.

completions.label: intercepting-route

documentation.value: Creates a page for intercepting routes using (.) (..) (...) conventions.

completions.label: route-group-layout

documentation.value: Creates a layout for a route group using (groupName) convention without affecting URL structure.

completions.label: template-component

documentation.value: Creates a template.tsx component that re-mounts on navigation unlike layouts.
Creates a minimal page with default export.

completions.label: global-error

documentation.value: Creates a global-error.tsx component for the root layout error boundary.

completions.label: metadata-static

documentation.value: Creates a static metadata export object for App Router pages and layouts.

completions.label: sitemap

documentation.value: Creates a sitemap.ts file for generating XML sitemaps.

completions.label: robots

documentation.value: Creates a robots.ts file for generating robots.txt.

completions.label: opengraph-image

documentation.value: Creates an opengraph-image.tsx route for dynamic OG image generation.
The useRouter hook from next/navigation allows programmatic navigation in Client Components. Returns router object with push, replace, refresh, prefetch, back, forward methods.
The usePathname hook returns the current URL pathname as a string. Must be used in a Client Component.
The useSearchParams hook returns a read-only URLSearchParams object for the current URL's query parameters.
The useParams hook returns an object containing the current route's dynamic parameters.
Returns the active route segment one level below the Layout it is called from. Useful for active navigation styling.
Returns an array of active route segments below the Layout it is called from.
Redirects the user to another URL. Can be used in Server Components, Route Handlers, and Server Actions. Throws a NEXT_REDIRECT error internally.
Redirects the user to another URL with a 308 status code (permanent redirect).
Throws a NEXT_NOT_FOUND error and renders the not-found.tsx UI for the route segment.
Extends the Web Request API with additional convenience methods. Used in Middleware and Route Handlers. Provides nextUrl, cookies, geo, ip properties.
Extends the Web Response API with additional methods. Provides json(), redirect(), rewrite(), next() static methods.
Creates a JSON response with the given body and optional response init options.
Creates a redirect response to the given URL with optional status code.
Creates a rewrite response that renders a different URL while preserving the original URL.
Continues the middleware chain. Optionally modify request headers.
Returns a read-only cookies store for incoming request cookies in Server Components and Route Handlers. Use .get(), .getAll(), .has(), .set(), .delete() methods.
Returns a read-only Headers object for the incoming request in Server Components and Route Handlers.
Purges cached data for a specific path. Can be used in Server Actions, Route Handlers. Accepts path and optional type ('page' or 'layout').
Purges cached data associated with a specific cache tag. Used with fetch cache tags for on-demand revalidation.

completions.label: unstable_cache

documentation.value: Wraps an async function to cache its result. Supports cache tags and revalidation period.

completions.label: generateViewport

documentation.value: Generates dynamic viewport configuration. Similar to generateMetadata but for viewport meta tags.

completions.label: fetch-with-cache

documentation.value: Extended fetch API with Next.js caching and revalidation options. Supports cache: 'force-cache' | 'no-store' and next.revalidate/tags.

completions.label: fetch-revalidate

documentation.value: Fetch data with time-based revalidation using Next.js extended fetch options.

completions.label: fetch-tags

documentation.value: Fetch data with cache tags for on-demand revalidation.
The useRouter hook from next/router for Pages Router. Returns router with pathname, query, asPath, push, replace, prefetch, events.

completions.label: getServerSideProps

documentation.value: Fetches data on each request for server-side rendering. Returns props to the page component. Only works in pages/ directory.

completions.label: getStaticProps

documentation.value: Fetches data at build time for static generation. Supports ISR with revalidate option. Only works in pages/ directory.

completions.label: getStaticPaths

documentation.value: Defines dynamic routes to be statically generated at build time. Used with getStaticProps for dynamic pages.
Type for page components in Pages Router. Generic type accepting props type parameter.
Type for getServerSideProps function in Pages Router.
Type for getStaticProps function in Pages Router.
Type for getStaticPaths function in Pages Router.
Import the optimized Image component from next/image for automatic image optimization, lazy loading, and responsive images.
Import the Link component from next/link for client-side navigation with prefetching.
Import a Google Font with automatic self-hosting and zero layout shift using next/font.

completions.label: import next/font/local

documentation.value: Import a local font file with automatic optimization.

completions.insertText:
import localFont from 'next/font/local';

const ${1:myFont} = localFont({ src: '${2:./fonts/font.woff2}' });

documentation.value: Import the Script component for optimized third-party script loading with strategy options.
Import the Head component from next/head for managing document head in Pages Router.
Import the dynamic function for lazy loading components with SSR control and loading states.
Import navigation hooks and utilities from next/navigation for App Router.
Import the useRouter hook from next/router for Pages Router navigation.
Import NextRequest, NextResponse, and other server utilities from next/server.
Import cookies and headers functions for reading request data in Server Components.
Import revalidatePath, revalidateTag, and unstable_cache for cache management.
Import ImageResponse for dynamic Open Graph image generation.

completions.label: images

documentation.value: Configure image optimization settings including domains, remote patterns, formats, and device sizes.
Configure URL rewrites to map incoming request paths to different destination paths.

completions.label: redirects

documentation.value: Configure URL redirects with permanent or temporary status codes.

completions.label: headers-config

documentation.value: Configure custom HTTP headers for specific routes.
Expose environment variables to the browser by adding them to the env config.

completions.label: webpack-config

documentation.value: Customize the webpack configuration used by Next.js.
Enable experimental Next.js features including serverActions, ppr, and more.

completions.label: metadata-object

documentation.value: Static metadata configuration object with title, description, openGraph, twitter, icons, robots.

completions.label: viewport-object

documentation.value: Viewport metadata configuration for controlling initial scale, width, and theme color.
Controls the dynamic behavior of a route segment. Options: 'auto' | 'force-dynamic' | 'error' | 'force-static'.
Sets the default revalidation time for the layout or page in seconds.
Sets the runtime for the route segment. Options: 'nodejs' | 'edge'.
Sets the preferred deployment region for the route segment for optimal latency.
Sets the maximum execution time for the route segment in seconds.
Controls the caching behavior of fetch requests in the route segment.
Controls whether dynamic params not generated by generateStaticParams return 404.
Optimized image component with automatic lazy loading, responsive sizing, blur placeholder support, and image format optimization.
Client-side navigation component with automatic prefetching. Extends HTML <a> tag with Next.js routing capabilities.
Optimized script loading component with strategy options: beforeInteractive, afterInteractive, lazyOnload, worker.
Configure a font with next/font for automatic self-hosting and optimization.
Lazy load a component with optional SSR disable and custom loading component.
Marks a component as a Client Component, enabling use of hooks, event handlers, browser APIs, and interactivity.
Marks a function or file as a Server Action, enabling server-side execution from client components.
Export default for page components, layouts, and route handlers.
Export an async function for server components, route handlers, and data fetching.
Export a static Metadata object for the page or layout.
Creates a next.config.js file with common configuration options.

completions.label: next.config.mjs

documentation.value: Creates a next.config.mjs file with ESM syntax.
Wraps an async component with Suspense for streaming and loading states.
Creates a form that submits to a Server Action.

completions.label: useFormStatus

documentation.value: Returns status information of the last form submission. Must be used inside a form with a Server Action.

completions.insertText: const { pending, data, method, action } = useFormStatus();

documentation.value: Manages form state based on the result of a Server Action.
Enables optimistic UI updates while a Server Action is executing.

completions.label: generateImageMetadata

documentation.value: Generates multiple images for a single route segment (icon, opengraph-image, etc.).
Creates a dynamic image response for OG images using JSX and CSS.
Programmatically navigate to a new URL using the App Router's router.push method.
Replace the current URL without adding a new entry to the browser's history stack.
Refresh the current route. Makes a new request to the server, re-fetching data and re-rendering Server Components.
Prefetch the provided route for faster client-side transitions.
Navigate back to the previous route in the browser's history stack.
Navigate forward to the next route in the browser's history stack.
Get a cookie by name from the request cookies store.
Set a cookie in Server Actions or Route Handlers.
Delete a cookie by name in Server Actions or Route Handlers.
Get a specific request header value.
Get a query parameter value from URLSearchParams.

documentation.value: Get all values for a query parameter.

Use cached data. Equivalent to getStaticProps behavior.
Fetch fresh data on every request. Equivalent to getServerSideProps behavior.
Set time-based revalidation for a fetch request in seconds.
Set cache tags for a fetch request for on-demand revalidation.
